final:
module bitwise_and (
	input clk,
	input [3:0] x,
	input [3:0] y,
	output reg [3:0] z);always @(posedge clk) begin
		z <= x & y;
	end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (x == 4'b0) begin
        z <= 4'b1;
      end else if (y == 4'b0) begin
        z <= 4'b1;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
